metric_value: More than 40 CDN vendors tracked by Aberdeen in 2001
notes: CDN market peaked at 40+ vendors before dot-com consolidation

metric_value: Fewer than a dozen CDN vendors remained by 2004
notes: Three years of market challenges pared the CDN field dramatically

metric_value: CDN usage rose dramatically during 2001-2004 consolidation period
notes: Despite vendor attrition usage grew across corporations governments and education

metric_value: CDNs moving beyond basic image page and media delivery toward application delivery
notes: CDN suppliers leveraging overlay networks to offer comprehensive application delivery solutions

metric_value: Regional data center approach minimizes infrastructure costs and increases control security and manageability
notes: Centralized-yet-distributed architecture at critical regional Internet crossroads

metric_value: Non-IT groups empowered with direct control over content delivery reducing IT mediation burden
notes: Marketing e-commerce and customer service teams can manage content flow directly

metric_value: More than 5 billion impressions per month
notes: Fastclick delivering massive ad volume using two services: Ad Network and AdServer

metric_value: 14000 buyers and sellers connected through Fastclick Ad Network
notes: Scale of Fastclick online ad inventory marketplace

metric_value: With a CDN we needed fewer servers less room less power and less floor space to meet performance thresholds
notes: Steve Chang CTO explaining CDN value proposition for high-volume ad serving

metric_value: Price was a huge issue; Mirror Image willing to build pricing model accounting for growth trajectory over time
notes: Chang chose Mirror Image for flexible pricing aligned with growth

metric_value: Traffic filtering and intrusion detection offloaded because everything goes through Mirror Image network
notes: CDN as security layer preventing direct hits to customer data center

metric_value: By not focusing on scaling bandwidth server or security issues team could enhance products faster
notes: Chang reporting that CDN freed engineering time for product development

metric_value: Working with Mirror Image on adding adaptive content action rules to improve geotargeting and ad rotation
notes: Fastclick exploring next-generation geotargeting capabilities

metric_value: Three major CDN vendors proved they could accelerate site offload data centers and reach consumers worldwide with similar pricing
notes: Toy retailer evaluated three major CDNs finding comparable core capabilities

metric_value: Chose Mirror Image for centralized yet distributed architecture ease of implementation high flexibility and strong reporting
notes: Director of Internet operations explaining vendor selection rationale

metric_value: Mirror Image improved significantly the site performance; can scale very cost-effectively
notes: Toy retailer confirming CDN performance and cost benefits

metric_value: Mirror Image moved from request to production level monitoring tool in less than 45 days
notes: Rapid custom development of real-time content monitoring and SLA validation tool

metric_value: MI staff is almost a part of my staff; MI support team helps resolve problems whether or not from Mirror Image
notes: Director praising deep integration of Mirror Image support with customer operations

metric_value: Customer programs content rules based on geotargeting time of day place in rotation and wild card image replacements
notes: Rules distributed with content throughout global network for local execution

metric_value: IT and Web operations can remove themselves from being key masters of content delivery; non-IT staff insert content directly
notes: Smart Content designed to let marketing and e-commerce teams own content customization

metric_value: Next stage of Web application delivery will benefit greatly from central management of rules applied on distributed basis
notes: Aberdeen predicting distributed rules-based application delivery as CDN future

metric_value: Mirror Image Internet acquired by Limelight Networks in 2006
notes: Company did not remain independent; absorbed into Limelight Networks

metric_value: Limelight Networks rebranded as Edgio in 2022; Edgio filed for bankruptcy in 2024
notes: Successor company to Mirror Image ultimately failed

metric_value: Parent company Xcelera.com dissolved circa 2007
notes: Publicly traded parent of Mirror Image ceased operations

metric_value: Fastclick acquired by ValueClick in 2005
notes: Major Mirror Image customer consolidated into larger ad network

metric_value: Smart Content platform positioned as next evolution of CDN services enabling non-IT content management
notes: Aberdeen recommending IT groups evaluate Smart Content capabilities

metric_value: Smart Content platform did not achieve widespread adoption; Mirror Image acquired before full market penetration
notes: Platform concept was sound but vendor did not survive independently

metric_value: CDNs increase flexibility improve response times for end-users and lower scalability costs for Web operations
notes: Core CDN value drivers identified by Aberdeen from customer research

metric_value: 75 employees
notes: Small company size relative to CDN market leaders

metric_value: On-demand and live Web casting options enabling customer communication via Internet-based audio and video
notes: Streaming media as standard CDN service offering alongside static content delivery
